schema.title: Response Admin List Users Admin Users Get

get.description: Database connectivity and optional ``ETH_RPC_URL`` JSON-RPC probe (readiness).

schema.title: Response Health Readiness Health Ready Get

ActivityEventOut.title: ActivityEventOut
ActivityEventOut.description: Single row for audit / activity UI (who did what, when).

role.title: Role
role.description: One of: admin, manager, user, viewer

AdminUserUpdate.title: AdminUserUpdate
AdminUserUpdate.description: Partial update: provide at least one field.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Applied page size; null means no LIMIT (all matching rows after skip).

tag_ids.title: Tag Ids
tag_ids.description: Replace all tags for this document; omit to leave unchanged.

collection_ids.title: Collection Ids
collection_ids.description: Replace all collection memberships for this document; omit to leave unchanged.

legal_hold.title: Legal Hold
legal_hold.description: When true, document cannot be soft-deleted until cleared.

retention_expires_at.title: Retention Expires At
retention_expires_at.description: UTC instant after which auto-retention may soft-delete (unless legal hold).

content_sha256_hex.title: Content Sha256 Hex
content_sha256_hex.description: SHA-256 digest of the file **contents** (raw bytes). Unrelated to the filename.

lifecycle_state.title: Lifecycle State
lifecycle_state.description: draft → review → published (workflow); legacy rows default published.

content_matches_stored_hash.title: Content Matches Stored Hash
content_matches_stored_hash.description: True if SHA-256 of bytes on disk equals the hash stored for this document (content integrity).

content_hash_matches_blockchain.title: Content Hash Matches Blockchain
content_hash_matches_blockchain.description: True if on-chain proof matches the stored content hash; False if mismatch; None if chain proof unavailable.

stored_content_sha256_hex.title: Stored Content Sha256 Hex
stored_content_sha256_hex.description: SHA-256 of the content recorded at upload (from the database).

computed_content_sha256_hex.title: Computed Content Sha256 Hex
computed_content_sha256_hex.description: SHA-256 recomputed from the file bytes on disk right now (same algorithm as upload).

chain_id.title: Chain Id
chain_id.description: Resolved chain id from global settings or ChainConfig.

parent_id.title: Parent Id
parent_id.description: Parent folder id; omit or null for a top-level folder.

role.title: Role
role.description: One of: admin, manager, user, viewer

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Upload, list, metadata, versions, and verification.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: User management and retention jobs (requires admin permissions).

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Liveness (`GET /health`) and readiness with DB + RPC (`GET /health/ready`).

tags.name: Collaboration
tags.description: ACL, share links, lifecycle workflow, and shared read/verify.
